description: Package the Jido Browser pinned agent-browser binary as a Nix derivation using a Nix glibc interpreter/RPATH rather than the generic /lib64 loader. Wire a stable binary path for development and releases. Reconcile and preserve the existing uncommitted flake.nix shell PATH cleanup that keeps host Codex available while filtering recursively injected Nix Codex binaries. Acceptance: flake evaluation and shell syntax checks pass, agent-browser help and a real navigation smoke test pass inside the Nix shell, Codex resolves correctly, and no manual patching of _build or global nix-ld is required.
title: Package agent-browser reproducibly for Nix
